purpose: Merged v14 TTS lexicon built from v13.1 base plus bridge and Paladin additions.

policy.vowelSequenceRule: Adjacent vowels are pronounced separately unless a future canon release explicitly marks a diphthong. Example: nau = nah-oo; auma = ah-oo-mah.
policy.interjectionNote: Interjections such as hm and sh are paralinguistic sound tokens, not normal morphology. They are special-cased in TTS and should not be used to justify digraphs in root formation.
